race.comment: HIZLI VEYSEL (1) Came in 4th last time at Bursa. Can make a comeback but has more weight to carry. Expect to go close. AKSÖZ (4) Came in 8th last run at Sanliurfa. Jockey Ahmet çEli̇K is an asset. Deserves consideration. ORÇUNTAY (5) Was competitive when 3rd last run at Adana but will be dropping in distance. Mehmet Sali̇H çEli̇K is a key engagement and form has been improving over recent runs. Genuine winning chance. ÇELIKGILLER (8) On a short turnaround. Below expectations when 7th last run around here and dropping back to a shorter trip. Vedat Abi̇ş is a plus. Can go on with it.
